name: TableComponent
description:
The component that represents a table. A table is a set of tabular data. Line items can support data, images and actions. ```html
```

inputs.name: keys
inputs.description: List of keys that identifies single columns

inputs.name: noBorderX
inputs.description: Whether or not to show the table's horizontal borders

inputs.name: noBorderY
inputs.description: Whether or not to show the table's vertical borders

inputs.name: noOuterBorder
inputs.description: Whether or not to show the table's outer border

inputs.name: popIn
inputs.description: Whether or not to display the table in pop in mode, it also require change of markup

inputs.name: responsive
inputs.description: Whether or not to display the table in responsive mode.

inputs.name: topBorder
inputs.description: Whether or not to show the table's top border

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Method that sorts and changes visible state of particular cells
